top_signals.title: Claude was the nice guy of AI – what changed?
top_signals.summary: The narrative around Anthropic’s Claude, initially perceived as the “ethical AI company,” has recently shifted due to concerns over perceived hypocrisy, aggressive ambition, model degradation, platform restrictions, and vendor lock-in risk, causing customers and developers to seek alternatives, says Lewis Liu Working title: Claude Was the Intellectual Nice Guy of AI. Then Something Shifted “You [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
